title: CGI India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CGI India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? CGI India Capital India in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
